response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience, with notable projects in geospatial data (GISCollective) and low-latency systems. However, his recent work lacks deep focus on C++/Rust or routing/navigation pipelines, which are core to this role. His adaptability and problem-solving skills are strengths, but alignment with the technical stack and domain is partial.
strengths: Extensive experience with geospatial data platforms (GISCollective) and open-source contributions, showing domain familiarity.
Proven ability to optimize systems for scale and performance (e.g., low-latency apps at Sociomantic, real-time data at RIDE Capital).
Strong problem-solving mindset with a track record of cross-stack innovation (e.g., TDD, CI/CD, distributed systems).
concerns: Primary expertise is in JavaScript/TypeScript and Dlang, with limited recent C++/Rust experience (critical for this role).
No explicit experience with routing/navigation data pipelines or traffic signal integration, key responsibilities here.
Recent roles emphasize full-stack/AI tooling, diverging from the specialized geospatial/navigation focus required.
